goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary status transition 写入层

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 canary status 写入层
summary.what: 为 Catty v0 增加受控 canary status transition 写入层：memory-canary.ts 支持 canary status 从 planned 扩展到 promotable/blocked/promoted，并提供 updateMemoryCanaryStatuses；memory-canary-promotion-transition.ts 增加 applyMemoryCanaryPromotionTransitions 和 CLI --write，把 persisted promotion decision 显式应用为 planned -> promotable 或 planned -> blocked；README 同步 dry-run/write 边界。
summary.why: 前序切片已经能把 canary queue、future eval、promotion preview 和 promotion decision 审计串起来，但 catty_memory_canaries.status 仍停在 planned。这个写入层让 dogfood/canary 闭环能保存 promotable/blocked 状态，同时继续把真正用户 memory 转正留给后续显式 promoted writer。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary status transition 写入层

decisions.chose: 只允许 persisted decision 驱动 planned -> promotable / planned -> blocked
decisions.rationale: 这是 canary dogfood 的下一步状态推进，但还不是用户 memory 转正。
rejected: 把 judgement/prediction 直接写成用户 memory

decisions.chose: 把 canary status CHECK 扩展到 planned/promotable/blocked/promoted，并在写入前重建旧 planned-only 表
decisions.rationale: 已有本地 SQLite 可能仍带旧 CHECK(status = planned)，写入层需要能安全升级而不要求手动迁移。

decisions.chose: 更新 canary plan 时保留既有 status
decisions.rationale: 后续 dry-run/queue 刷新不应该把已经 blocked/promotable 的 canary 退回 planned。

rejected.alternative: 把 status transition 接入 launchd heartbeat 或 nightly runner
rejected.reason: 当前目标是手动显式写入；自动调度会扩大运行态和模型调用边界。

rejected.alternative: 本轮实现 promoted/user memory writer
rejected.reason: promoted 需要写用户 memory 和 catty_memory_audit，属于更高风险的独立切片。

acknowledged_constraints.note: --write 只更新 catty_memory_canaries.status，不写用户长期 memory。
测试验证 memory audit 计数保持不变。
没有接 heartbeat/nightly runner，也没有新增模型调用路径。
CLAUDE.md 保持未暂存、未提交。

review_notes: Preflight overlaps 来自同一 catty 分支历史 proposed intents，本轮已按顺序切片分类，不是语义冲突。
验证：focused transition 3 pass；memory canary + transition 7 pass；canary/promotion 相关 19 pass；bun test src/catty/*.test.ts 39 pass；bun test 44 pass；git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 通过。

CLI smoke：memory-canary-promotion-transition --help、默认 dry-run、--write 空队列均正常；live runtime status ok，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok，full pipeline ok/throttled。

architectural_claims: Catty v0 canary dogfood now has an explicit status write layer after promotion decisions, but actual user memory promotion remains a separate future writer.
Canary status is queue state, not memory admission state.
behavioral_changes: memory-canary-promotion-transition default mode remains dry-run and does not mutate canary status.
memory-canary-promotion-transition --write updates planned canaries with persisted promotable decisions to promotable.
memory-canary-promotion-transition --write updates planned canaries with persisted blocked decisions to blocked.
Status updates preserve user memory and catty_memory_audit boundaries and do not call model providers or heartbeat.
memory-canary queue upsert preserves existing canary status instead of resetting it to planned.

api_changes.signature: updateMemoryCanaryStatuses(options: { storeDbPath?: string; updates: MemoryCanaryStatusUpdate[]; now?: string }): QueuedMemoryCanaryPlan[]

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json are read or printed.
--write does not call PiBrain/PiJudge or any model provider.
--write does not write user memory or catty_memory_audit.
migration_notes: No standalone migration command is required; updateMemoryCanaryStatuses upgrades the old planned-only CHECK schema before applying status changes.
Existing dry-run consumers of memory-canary-promotion-transition.ts keep the same default behavior.
